details.test: Task 1: Book cheapest highly rated weekend mushroom walk near Manchester in May for 2 adults
Task 2: Enroll in online beginner herbs course under $100 with >= 4 hours
Task 3: Save July family-friendly morning foraging events near Seattle to Favorites
Task 4: Purchase $75 gift voucher and field guide under $25 in single checkout
Task 5: Choose and book 3-day coastal foraging retreat in August with more included meals
Task 6: Book earliest beginner plant identification walk <3h and <=£60 for 1 adult + 1 child
Task 7: Update profile preferences (intermediate, vegan, Portland 50mi, monthly newsletter)
Task 8: Save two nettles recipes under 45 minutes to Reading List
Task 9: Submit private group request for October 3-hour Sunday morning mushroom walk for 8 people
